_publications._publicationTitle: PERADIGM: Phenotype embedding similarity-based rare disease gene mapping.

_contextSnippet: genome-wide scanning with PERADIGM identified three significant genes associated with ADPKD-related phenotypes after p-value adjustment. In comparison, SKAT-O identified only PKD1 and PKD2
details: Identified 3 significant genes (PKD1, PKD2, IFT140) for ADPKD after p-value adjustment, compared to SKAT-O which only identified PKD1 and PKD2
